summary.concern: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — 18 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Good momentum — overdue count is down to 55. Well below the 7-day average of 67 — the team is making real progress. 23 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 2 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Milagros Porturas:** Down to 3 overdue — making progress.

189 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **77 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 20 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$85,264 in payments going out this week** across 40 tasks — make sure funds are available. $29,388 expected in from 3 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Clifford Clack — Gym Addition and Stephanie and Marc Felton — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 16. Keep the momentum going.
